title: alstonia lenormandii var. lenormandii
intro: Alstonia lenormandii var. lenormandii, also known as the "Yuan Zhi" plant, is a type of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Alstonia lenormandii var. lenormandii include improving sleep quality, reducing anxiety and stress, and boosting the immune system. Alstonia lenormandii var. lenormandii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
